sources.cleaned_content:
# Heavy Cut Compound 400

## An innovative automotive polish that removes scratches and creates gloss in a single step

The professional polish for automotive clear coats – with a new and improved formula – always leaves a glistening impression. As the detailers’ favorite polish, it eliminates sanding marks in record time, quickly removes scratches on the car, and generates gloss all the way to the finish. Thanks to cutting-edge polishing technology with diminishing abrasives.

Multi-stage premium polish

### Processing

- Rotary: At the start: 800–1,500 rpm / Towards the end: 1,800–2,000 rpm
- Orbital: Lower to upper rotational speed range

### Volumes

- 250ml | 22202.281.001
- 1l | 22202.261.001

### Cut/Gloss

8/8

### Steps

- Step 1: Heavy Cut
- Step 2: Medium Cut
- Step 3: Finish
- Step 4: Protection

### Optimised for

- Premium Lambswool Pad
- Crater Shaped Lambswool Pad
- Double Sided Lambswool Pad
- Orbital Wool Pad
- Heavy Cut Foam Pad

### Product Images

- https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Autopolitur/Produktbilder/Produkt_Hintergrund/menzerna_HCC400_1100x1100.png
- https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Autopolitur/Produktbilder/Produkt_freigestellt/Autopolitur_Heavy_Cut_Compound_400_IF_freigestellt_1100x1100.png
- /fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Products/22202.261.001/rotation01.jpg

### Benefits

- Improved formula
- Polishes and generates gloss in a single step
- Saves time thanks to single-stage working (cut to finish)
- Speedy removal of deep car paint scratches
- Easy to wipe away
- Highly effective
- Outstanding gloss
- Silicone-free
- No buildup of dust

### Recommended usage

- Clean the surface thoroughly.
- Shake the bottle and apply the polish to the polishing pad.
- Use either a rotary or an orbital polishing machine and use the cross-coating method. Start by polishing at a low rotational speed while exerting strong pressure.
- Take away the pressure in the final cycles and increase the speed of the polishing machine.
- At first, the polish will seem a little milky and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible.
- Once you have finished polishing, remove any residue with the Premium microfiber cloth.
- Depending on the demands of the surface, a second stage may be performed. Here, you have the option of reapplying Menzerna HCC 400 or using a Menzerna Finish polish.
- Explanatory video: https://youtu.be/pwpZpsdb0mI

### Downloads

- Technical datasheet HCC 400 (114.98 KB): /fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Dokumente/Technische_Datenblaetter/Autopolituren/EN/TDB_03_HCC400IF__EN_09.2021.pdf

### FAQ

**What’s the best car polish?**
Menzerna’s professional polishes are high-quality premium polishes made from high-quality polishing agents without any fillers or silicones. Which Menzerna polish is the right car polish for each application depends on many factors (type of paint, condition, desired polishing machine, etc.).

**What is the difference between HCC400 & HCC400 Improved Formulation?**
With the rework of our car polish Heavy Cut Compound 400, we were able to further improve our multi-stage premium polish. The improved formulation ensures effective and user-friendly work. More pleasant working without solvent odor, easier removal of the polish as well as less dust development now ensure better polishing experiences. Find an explanatory video of the HCC 400 Improved Formulation here: https://youtu.be/pwpZpsdb0mI

**How do I polish a car and achieve a showroom finish?**
It takes a multi-stage polishing process to give a car the ultimate level of shine. Menzerna offers various combinations that lead to a showroom finish. For example, the following finishes can be used in the order specified: HCC 400, MCP 2500, SFP 3800. To maintain the polishing results, a sealant such as Power Lock can be applied afterwards.

**How do I polish a black car?**
Black paint is polished like other colors of paint. Either a Heavy Cut, Medium Cut, or Finish polish is selected depending on the condition of the paint. Because even the smallest scratches are easy to see on black cars, we recommend finishing off the polishing process with a Finish polish. The SF 3500 and SFP 3800 gloss polishes create the ultimate shine even on dark paints.

**How do I remove a ceramic coating once applied?**
A ceramic coating can be removed with a Heavy Cut polish (e.g., HCC400) and the Heavy Cut Foam Pad.

### Video

Car polish HCC 400: The HCC 400 automotive polish always leaves a glistening impression. It represents the perfect choice when it comes to removing scratches while simultaneously generating gloss. This abrasive polish is suitable for all car coatings and boasts ease of use.
Video URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aV25NmeozxM

# Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 - 128 oz

Best Seller

Product Image: https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Menzerna-Heavy-Cut-Compound-400-128-oz_688_3_m_2727.jpg

Price: $200.99

### Quantity Discounts

| Quantity | Price | Savings |
| 2+ | $184.99 | 8% |

### Available Sizes

- 32 oz - $58.99 ($1.84/oz)
- 8 oz - $22.99 ($2.87/oz)
- 128 oz - $200.99 ($1.57/oz)

Product Codes: M-400Q, M-400-8, M-400G

### Product Information

- Easily remove heavy imperfections while leaving behind a high gloss finish!
- Apply with a cutting pad (i.e. Lake Country Orange Light Cutting Pad, Surbuf R Series MicroFingers Buffing Pads or Optimum Microfiber Cutting Pad)
- Very low dusting which makes for easy cleanup
- On darker finishes follow up with a finer Menzerna polish like the Power Finish PF 2500, Super Finish Polish SF 4000 or Micro Polish SF 4500
- Premium medium to heavy cutting polish, that finishes down extremely well!

### Product Description

Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 (Formally known as Fast Gloss Compound FG 400) is a game changing polish that is finally available to the US markets. This product has been wildly popular throughout Europe and it's now finally available for professional detailers and enthusiasts alike. You can use this product to remove medium to heavy imperfections (swirls, fine scratches, heavy oxidation, watermarks, etc.) while simultaneously leaving behind a high gloss finish! In one use you'll instantly notice how quickly and effectively you're removing imperfections while expending less energy in less time. This polish is incredibly effective and we're confident it's going to be an amazing addition to your detailing routine.

On some lighter colored finishes you may not even be able to detect any haze. It's truly amazing to be compounding and possibly be done polishing in just one step! On darker finishes you may have some light haze left behind, which is to be expected. Use a finer polish and softer pad combo next to remove any haze and make the paint even more optically clear. Afterward Menzerna recommends using another finer Menzerna polish like the Power Finish PF 2500, Super Finish Polish SF 4000 or Micro Polish SF 4500 to finish the paint down to perfection! Combining any one of these polishes with the Fast Gloss should make the paint look absolutely stunning. Fast Gloss is safe to use on any type of paint and it leaves behind little dusting, making it super easy to clean up. Simply apply with a cutting pad (i.e. Lake Country Orange Light Cutting Pad, Surbuf R Series MicroFingers Buffing Pads or Optimum Microfiber Cutting Pad) for best results, via a buffer. It can be applied with an orbital buffer like the Porter Cable 7424 XP or a rotary buffer. If you are looking for a heavy compounding polish that leaves behind a high gloss finish then the Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 is for you!

To learn more about Menzerna Polishes and the 2015 label name change please see the Menzerna Polishing Chart.

### Professional Detailer Reviews

"This will be my go to compound from now on as it works fast, is smooth to work, and dusts next to none! The car won't need a washing after the compounding unlike some other compounds on the market, so its a time saver as well! For anyone looking for turning their 3 step process into a 2 step process, this is a product you need to try out and fit into your arsenal of products!" - Envious Detailing: Menzerna Fast Gloss Review by Eric Schuster

### Videos

- Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 | How to Compound Black Paint (https://img.youtube.com/vi/If3cxKpdLZw/hqdefault.jpg)
- Menzerna | Heavy Cut Compound 400 (https://img.youtube.com/vi/aV25NmeozxM/hqdefault.jpg)

### Product Downloads

- 2015 Menzerna Label Name Change Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna_2015_Label_Name_Change_Chart.pdf
- 2015 Menzerna Polishing Compounds Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-2015-Polishing-Program.pdf
- 2015 Menzerna Polishing Program: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-Polishing-Programme.pdf
- 2019 Menzerna Polishing Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-Chart.pdf
- Menzerna Paint Defect Repair Product Range: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-Paint-Defect-Repair-Product-Range.pdf
- Menzerna Polishing Compounds Chart: https://www.detailedimage.com/product-downloads/Menzerna-Polishing-Compounds-Chart.pdf

### From The Label

**High Performance Compound**
One-step polish, removes 1200 sand marks at an absolute high gloss

### Customer Reviews

98% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 42 ratings)

**John Jr G. (3/12/2025) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes**
This stuff is unbelievably good. It works fantastic on a DA with any pad with some body to it. Zero dust, quick and smooth cut with a phenomenal finish. Start slow and finish on high with some pressure…AMAZING. It is particularly amazing on fresh clear coat.

**Michael B. (5/1/2024) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes**
Buy again - maybe. I guess I was expecting more stellar results from compounding (Toyota SUV) with rotary and a wool pad. While Menzerna HC 400 was easy to work with, I can't say it performed any better than Meguiar's 91 or Ardex 2408 variable grit products on heavy oxidation. I will also be trying it on my boat black gelcoat.

**Scott L. (10/31/2023) - DI Verified Purchase - Would buy again: Yes**
Menzerna compounds are the best, and Heavy Cut 400 is the perfect first step of a multi step correction process. This also works great as a 1 step with a softer pad. With all Menz polished this doesn't dry up or get greasy, does it's intended job and wipes off easily! Thanks DI for quick shipping!

FG400 Fast Gloss Compound - Fast Gloss high-performance compound is the industry leading solution for PBE, Detail Reconditioning and industrial polishing applications. With the ability to eliminate a ~1300 grit sanding mark and leave a high-gloss finish in one step, Fast Gloss compound has set a new standard for efficiency, performance and labor savings.

Body shops can now use one product to quickly eliminate sanding marks using rotary or DA machines with wool or foam compounding pads. Dusting has been significantly reduced making clean up virtually unnecessary. If necessary on dark colors for critical polishing jobs a final polish such as Final Finish 3000 or Super Finish 4000 can be used, totally eliminating any hint of buffing marks, haze or holograms. For the Marine market Fast Gloss will eliminate oxidation on chalky gel coat leaving the finish ready for a protective coating of wax.

Fast Gloss 400 is the new flagship product in the Menzerna line and the future of polishing compound technology that you can use today.

**Benefits:**
- Polishes and produces gloss in one step
- Saves time thanks to one-step polishing process
- High efficiency
- High gloss Level
- Silicone-free

sources.page_title: Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 (FG400) - Aggressive Compound — Polished Bliss
sources.cleaned_content:
# Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 (FG400)

Brand: Menzerna

Price: £14.95 (250 ml) / £37.00 (1 L)

Availability: 30 in stock, ready to be shipped

Product Images:
- //www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/menzerna-400-both-1548x1430w_1410x1410.webp?v=1709139711
- //www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/menzerna-400-250ml_1_1053x1053.jpg?v=1709139711
- //www.polishedbliss.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/menzerna-400-1000ml_1-1548x1430w_1410x1410.webp?v=1709139740

## We Say

If you asked most professional detailers to write down a wish list of features for an aggressive cutting compound, they'd likely list the following points: high cut level; well lubricated; long working time; no dust; no fillers. Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 (FG400) embodies this set of features and is nothing short of a revelation. It cuts paint back quickly and easily, produces very little dust and does not hide residual defects. These characteristics are a welcome break from the norm, and make Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 (FG400) one of the very best aggressive cutting compounds currently on the market. Our only caveat is that it removes a lot of paint in a very short space of time, and must therefore be used with extreme care.

## Key Features

- Cut Level: 8/10 (Compared To Others)
- Filling Power: 0/10 (Compared To Others)
- Gloss Level: 8/10 (Compared To Others)

## Description

Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 (FG400) is an aggressive professional cutting compound. It cuts paint back quickly and easily, and is thus ideal for tackling deep scratches and severe acid etching. Unlike many cutting compounds, it also finishes down well to give a sharp, high gloss finish that, in most cases, needs only minor refining with a finishing polish afterwards. Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 (FG400) uses coarse precision-milled diminishing abrasives suspended in a base of lubricating oils. Like its siblings, it contains no fillers of any kind. Although designed with scratch-resistant clearcoats in mind, it's also suitable for use on conventional hard paint finishes in situations where maximum cut is required.

## Specification

| Property | Value |
| Adds Protection | No |
| Chemical Basis | Water-based |
| Contains Abrasive Particles | Yes (diminishing) |
| Contains Fillers And Glazing Oils | No |
| Cut Level | 8 |
| Gloss Level | 8 |
| Suitable For Hand Use | No |
| Suitable For Hard Paints | Yes |
| Suitable For Intermediate Paints | Yes |
| Suitable For Machine Use | Yes |
| Suitable For Soft Paints | Yes |

## How To Use

Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 (FG400) should only be applied by machine. For best results using a dual action polisher, Menzerna Heavy Cut Compound 400 (FG400) should be applied to freshly decontaminated paint using either a Gyeon Q2M Eccentric Heavy Cutting Pad or a Gyeon Q2M Eccentric Cutting Pad. Only 3-4 pea-sized drops of product are required per 18 x 18 area, and these should be worked in thoroughly at 4000-5000 orbits per minute (speed 4-5 on most dual action polishers) until only a thin oily residue remains. This residue should then be buffed off carefully using a PB Super Buffing Towel.
